title: 1. Baled Cocofiber
usage: Used primarily in industrial manufacturing for mattresses, upholstery, and car seats.

title: 2. Cocofiber Mats & Geotextiles
description: Woven nets or mats made from strong cocofiber ropes.
usage: Used for soil erosion control, landscaping, and stabilizing slopes.

title: 3. Cocofiber Ropes
description: Strong, durable natural ropes twisted from coconut fibers.
usage: Used in agriculture, aquatic farming, and traditional crafting.

long-description:
We are exporters of premium-quality cocofiber, produced in Indonesia. We specialize in supplying high-quality, durable cocofiber that is highly valued for its natural strength and resistance to saltwater and microbial degradation. Our cocofiber is sourced from the finest coconut husks processed in advanced facilities.

Here are some reasons why cocofiber from Indonesia is the best choice for your business needs:

• Superior Durability: Known for being extremely tough, elastic, and resistant to rot, making it perfect for both industrial and agricultural applications.

• 100% Eco-Friendly and Biodegradable: Our cocofiber is a natural, sustainable resource that leaves zero negative impact on the environment.

• Premium Quality: We rigorously sort and grade our fibers to ensure minimal dust and high tensile strength, meeting international export standards.

• Flexible Packaging and On-Time Delivery: We provide tightly compressed bales to maximize shipping efficiency and guarantee timely deliveries worldwide.

title: Cocofiber Moisture Content and Impurities
Moisture Content: Moisture content refers to the percentage of water contained in the cocofiber. The ideal moisture content for export-grade cocofiber is typically between 15% and 20%. Impact on Quality: Keeping the moisture level in check prevents molding during transit and ensures the fibers retain their natural elasticity and strength.
Humidity: Impurities refer to the amount of dust, pith, and foreign matter mixed with the fiber. We guarantee an impurity level of less than 3%, ensuring that you receive clean, long, and strong fibers ready for immediate industrial use.
